violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Bakery -Multiple cases of breads and cookies in walk in freezer were left open.--Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Produce -Case of food on floor in Produce walk in cooler.--Working container holding food item was not labeled properly to identify contents. Meat -Repackaged pre-cooked sausage patties do not have ingredient labels. Deli -Majority of cold grab n go items do not have ingredient labels.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Deli -2 door refrigerator found with food temperatures 44-47F, unit thermometer at 48-50F. *Deli was in an out of unit frequently for last 1-2 hours and believe the doors do not always "suction" or latch closed which may affect unit. *Directed to ice products in unit to bring temperature down and monitor to ensure unit recovers to food temps of 41F or less.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. Meat -Residue build up on white trays.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Deli -Residue at exterior surfaces of bin used to stored cook line cleaning utensils. -Dust/debris at wire shelf rack next to 2 door refrigerator.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Bakery/Deli -Storage containers on shelf below shelf of chemicals across from dish pit.--Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Produce -Case of single use trays stored on floor.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Backroom -Rough cement at door transition and floor at new walk in freezer area. -Rust/damage at exterior wall of meat department walk in cooler. -Unsealed crack at cement floor juncture where old walk in freezer had been. Bakery/Deli: -Rough worn shelves at chemical storage across from dish pit.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Deli/Bakery -Dust/debris at wall behind breading station. Meat -Dust at fan covers in meat prep room. -Limescale staining at dish pit wall

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Bakery/Deli -Employee items (phone, water bottles, jacket) at bakery and deli packaging areas.--Lockers or other suitable facilities were not provided for the orderly storage of employees' clothing/possessions.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Method, temperature and time (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
